positive: Stylized, mystical celestial forest scene, centered composition, featuring bioluminescent flora and floating crystalline fauna against a deep twilight sky. The primary elements are stylized, branching cosmic vines, abstract lunar phases, and glowing geometric flowers in shades of teal, indigo, gold, and lavender. Use high contrast against a black background for maximum print pop. The artwork should have a clean, graphic, etched line aesthetic combined with soft, ethereal gradients, mimicking screen printing or detailed ink drawing. Highly symmetrical composition suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and intricate, non-photorealistic details. Fantasy art, Zentangle style, vector illustration, high detail, dramatic lighting, clean edge lines.
